content.speakerText: How many books can I check out at once, and how long can I keep 'em?
content.speakerTextCn: 我一次能借几本书？能借多久？
expectedAnswers: You can borrow up to 10 books for four weeks, and you can renew them if no one else needs them.
Ten books, four weeks — easy! Renewals are allowed.
You're allowed 10 books total, with a 28-day loan period. Just bring them back on time!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：准确回答了借阅数量和期限两个问题
语言准确性：语法正确，使用了场景关键词如 'borrow', 'renew', 'loan period'
表达自然度：使用了口语缩略形式（如 'four weeks' 而非 'twenty-eight days'）或自然语气
关键词覆盖：至少包含 'books', 'weeks/days', 'renew' 中的两个

content.speakerText: Can I renew my books if I need more time?
content.speakerTextCn: 如果我需要更多时间，我可以续借吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, you can renew them once, as long as no one else has requested them.
Sure! Renewals are allowed — just come in before the due date.
You can extend the loan for another week, but only one time.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确回答是否可以续借，并说明条件
语言准确性：正确使用 'renew', 'extend', 'due date' 等关键词
表达自然度：使用了口语化表达（如 'Sure!', 'just come in'）
关键词覆盖：至少包含 'renew' 或 'extend' 和 'due date' 或 'requested'

content.speakerText: What if I lose a book? Do I have to pay for it?
content.speakerTextCn: 如果我弄丢了书，我需要赔钱吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, you'll need to pay the replacement cost — usually the price of the book.
Unfortunately, yes. You have to cover the cost of replacing it.
If it's lost, you'll be charged the full price. But if you find it later, you can get a refund.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确说明是否需要赔偿及赔偿方式
语言准确性：使用了 'replacement cost', 'charged', 'cover the cost' 等正确表达
表达自然度：语气自然，符合图书馆工作人员的回应方式
关键词覆盖：至少包含 'pay', 'replace', 'cost' 中的两个
